overview: Boros Moxite is a fast, four-color tempo deck that leverages Moxite for early mana acceleration to deploy cheap threats like Glint Hawk ahead of schedule. It uses efficient pump spells like Lembas and versatile removal such as Galvanic Blast to maintain board control and push lethal damage quickly. The W/U/B/R color scheme provides access to a wide array of low-cost interaction and finishers while staying strictly within Pauper legality.
win_conditions: Combat damage with pumped Glint Hawks
Overwhelming early board presence with accelerated threats

keep_criteria: Hands containing Moxite paired with a one-drop threat or spell
Hands with two or more cheap interaction spells
Hands featuring early pump or removal to protect a turn-one play
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early mana acceleration or one-drops
Hands with only high-cost cards or no interaction
Hands missing a clear path to turn-one or turn-two pressure

early_game: Play Moxite on turn one to enable turn-two threats
Deploy Glint Hawk early to establish flying pressure
Use Galvanic Blast to remove key blockers or chip away at life total
mid_game: Cast Lembas to pump existing threats and push through blockers
Leverage the four-color palette for versatile cheap interaction
Maintain board presence by cycling through low-cost spells and artifacts
late_game: Use accumulated pump effects to push lethal combat damage
Transition to value by trading efficiently with Galvanic Blast
Stabilize with resilient creatures and finish with direct damage

key_cards.name: Moxite
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to enable turn-two threats; prioritize keeping it in mulligans for early speed

key_cards.name: Glint Hawk
key_cards.notes: Deploy ahead of schedule with Moxite; pump with Lembas to create unblockable attackers

key_cards.name: Galvanic Blast
key_cards.notes: Use to clear blockers, answer problematic creatures, or chip damage to the opponent

key_cards.name: Lembas
key_cards.notes: Cast on your turn to maximize combat impact; use to push through blockers or secure lethal

sequencing_tips: Hold Galvanic Blast in hand until you identify a key threat to remove or a moment to chip damage
Cast Lembas on your turn to maximize combat damage rather than using it defensively
Prioritize playing Moxite before pumping to ensure you have enough mana for both spells
Use the four-color interaction suite to answer opponent's plays while maintaining your own board presence

matchups.advice: Use Galvanic Blast efficiently to remove their biggest threats and chip damage; pump Glint Hawks to push through early pressure.
Apply constant pressure with accelerated threats to prevent them from stabilizing; use pump spells to bypass counterspells and removal.
Race them with early flying threats and pump effects; use Galvanic Blast to disrupt their value loops and maintain tempo.
